message:
fix(airtable): harden content-length detection and simplify connector internals

Client:
- Parse Content-Length header explicitly via header::CONTENT_LENGTH
  with fallback to reqwest's content_length(), handling servers that
  send non-standard casing or multiple Content-Length headers
- Replace checked_add+unwrap_or chain with saturating_add for cleaner
  streaming byte accumulation overflow handling

Connector:
- Add BoxFcpFuture<'a, T> type alias to reduce Pin<Box<dyn Future>>
  repetition in recursive linked-record expansion signatures
- Simplify nested Err match arms using OR patterns
  (AirtableError::Api { 404 } | RecordNotFound)

Integration tests:
- Rewrite oversized content-length test to use raw TCP server instead
  of MockServer, ensuring the exact Content-Length header value is
  sent without the mock framework interfering with header serialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
